workflows.name: Sign in with valid credentials
workflows.on_success: flash 'Signed in successfully.' and redirect to Accounts Overview and unlock left-hand navigation

workflows.name: Navigate to Forgot Password (request password reset)
workflows.on_success: redirect to Forgot Password / Password Reset page

workflows.name: Successful registration with valid input
workflows.on_success: Account created successfully — please sign in; redirect to login page

workflows.name: Click Account Number (row action)
workflows.on_success: Clickable but not implemented (no navigation or detail view is performed)

workflows.name: Open New Account action from action bar
workflows.on_success: Navigate to/Open New Account flow (user is taken to the Open New Account module)

workflows.name: Transfer Funds action from action bar
workflows.on_success: Navigate to/Transfer Funds flow (user is taken to the Transfer Funds module)

workflows.name: Payments action from action bar
workflows.on_success: Navigate to/Payments flow (user is taken to the Payments module)

workflows.name: Open Account (valid submission)
workflows.on_success: Account opened successfully!; redirect_to: Accounts Overview

workflows.name: Submit transfer (base)
workflows.on_success: Shows "Transfer completed successfully." and returns a transaction ID

workflows.name: Internal transfer between ParaBank accounts
workflows.on_success: Shows "Transfer completed successfully." and returns a transaction ID

workflows.name: External transfer to an external account (with account number confirmation)
workflows.on_success: Shows "Transfer completed successfully." and returns a transaction ID

workflows.name: Successful payment submission
workflows.on_success: Returns message "Payment submitted successfully." with a reference code and updates account balances.

workflows.name: Payment submission fails — account numbers do not match
workflows.on_success: Display inline error: "Account numbers do not match" and keep the form editable.

workflows.name: Payment submission fails — insufficient funds in selected source account
workflows.on_success: Display inline error: "Insufficient funds" and keep the form editable.

workflows.name: Apply (base submission)
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! (mock account details displayed; no actual balance debits occur in this mock system)

workflows.name: Apply with Loan_Type == Personal (Loan Amount validation: $1,000-$50,000)
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! (mock account details displayed; no actual balance debits occur in this mock system)

workflows.name: Apply with Loan_Type == Auto (Loan Amount validation: $5,000-$75,000)
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! (mock account details displayed; no actual balance debits occur in this mock system)

workflows.name: Apply with Loan_Type == Home (Loan Amount validation: $50,000-$500,000)
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! (mock account details displayed; no actual balance debits occur in this mock system)

workflows.name: Submit valid profile update
workflows.on_success: Profile updated successfully and refreshes the data

workflows.name: Request new card
workflows.on_success: Card request submitted successfully. Opens card-request ticket and returns tracking ID.

workflows.name: Update card controls
workflows.on_success: Card controls updated successfully.

workflows.name: Execute Buy trade
workflows.on_success: executes same-day trade, updates holdings, displays "Trade executed successfully." with order ID

workflows.name: Execute Sell trade
workflows.on_success: executes same-day trade, updates holdings, displays "Trade executed successfully." with order ID

workflows.name: Create recurring investment plan
workflows.on_success: stores schedule and shows "Plan created successfully."

workflows.name: Generate statement (base)
workflows.on_success: Statement generated successfully and initiates retrieval of relevant transactions.

workflows.name: Generate statement for Month and Year
workflows.on_success: Statement generated successfully and initiates retrieval of relevant transactions.

workflows.name: Generate statement for Custom Date Range
workflows.on_success: Statement generated successfully and initiates retrieval of relevant transactions.

workflows.name: Save e-statement preference (base — paperless not selected)
workflows.on_success: e-Statement preference updated.

workflows.name: Save e-statement preference with Paperless opted in (Email required)
workflows.on_success: e-Statement preference updated.

workflows.name: Change password (valid current password, strong new password, matching confirmation)
workflows.on_success: Password changed successfully.

workflows.name: Send secure message
workflows.on_success: Message sent successfully. Returns ticket ID.

workflows.name: Request callback
workflows.on_success: Callback request submitted. Sends email confirmation.
